details.test: Task 1: Enroll 3 managers in cheapest qualifying June in-person 2-day workshop
Task 2: Submit custom program quote request for 3-month program
Task 3: Choose better short self-paced/online course and add 1 enrollment to cart
Task 4: Build learning plan with 3 different workshops
Task 5: Register for earliest free coaching-related webinar within next 60 days
Task 6: Save two technology-industry senior/executive case studies to favorites
Task 7: Configure virtual team package for 12 participants and schedule consultation
Task 8: Request intro call with least expensive 10+ years executive coach
Task 9: Subscribe to leadership newsletter with weekly leadership trends & remote teams
